CONTENT.Honours: Juventus U23Coppa Italia Serie C: 2019–20JuventusCoppa Italia: 2020–21Supercoppa Italiana: 2020
CONTENT.Early life: Di Pardo was born in Rimini, Italy, to a father from Campobasso, Italy.
CONTENT.Club career: Di Pardo made his Serie C debut for Juventus U23 on 16 September 2018, in a game against Alessandria. Di Pardo's first goal came on 28 September 2020, in a 2–1 win against Pro Sesto.On 27 January 2021, he made his debut for Juventus, coming on as a substitute in a 4–0 Coppa Italia win over SPAL. Di Pardo's Serie A debut came on 22 February, as a substitute against Crotone in a 3–0 win.On 27 July 2021, Di Pardo moved to Vicenza on loan. On 29 January 2022, he moved on a new loan to Cosenza.On 30 June 2022, Di Pardo joined Cagliari on loan with an option to buy and an obligation to buy conditional on Cagliari's promotion to Serie A.

SUMMARY: Alessandro Di Pardo (born 18 July 1999) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a right-back or midfielder for Serie A club Cagliari.
